class.name: BlaziumBigNum
class.brief_description: Number representation up to [code]1e(2^64)[/code], useful for incremental games.
class.description: Number representation up to [code]1e(2^64)[/code], useful for incremental games.

method.name: abs_num
method.description: Returns the absolute value.

method.name: add
method.description: Adds [param other] and returns the new value.

method.name: as_string
method.description: Returns the value as a string with a specified [param precision]. Use [method to_pretty_string] if you need the scientific e notation.

method.name: compare_to
method.description: Does a comparison with [param other]. Returns [code]1[/code] if [param other] is bigger, [code]-1[/code] if [param other] is smaller and [code]0[/code] if it is equal.

method.name: div
method.description: Divides by [param other] and returns the new value.

method.name: exp
method.description: Returns e^[param n].

method.name: from_bignum
method.description: Creates a [BlaziumBigNum] from [param value].

method.name: from_float
method.description: Creates a [BlaziumBigNum] from [param value].

method.name: from_mantissa_exponent
method.description: Creates a [BlaziumBigNum] from a [param mantissa] and a [param exponent].

method.name: from_string
method.description: Creates a [BlaziumBigNum] from a string representing a number, supports scientific e notation. [codeblock] var big_num = BlaziumBigNum.from_string("1.2e200") [/codeblock]

method.name: get_default_max_digits
method.description: Returns the default amount of "real" digits to display before using scientific notation.

method.name: get_default_print_precision
method.description: Returns the default amount of fractional digits to display on scientific notation.

method.name: get_exponent
method.description: Returns the exponent.

method.name: get_inf
method.description: Returns the infinite representation.

method.name: get_mantissa
method.description: Returns the mantissa.

method.name: get_max
method.description: Returns the maximum value.

method.name: get_min
method.description: Returns the minimum value.

method.name: get_nan
method.description: Returns the not-a-number representation.

method.name: is_approximately_equal
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is equal within a [param tolerance].

method.name: is_equal_to
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is equal.

method.name: is_greater_than
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is smaller.

method.name: is_greater_than_or_equal_to
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is smaller or equal.

method.name: is_inf
method.description: Returns true if is infinite.

method.name: is_less_than
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is greater.

method.name: is_less_than_or_equal_to
method.description: Returns true if [param other] is greater or equal.

method.name: is_nan
method.description: Returns true if is not a number.

method.name: is_negative
method.description: Returns true if is negative.

method.name: is_positive
method.description: Returns true if is positive.

method.name: log10
method.description: Returns log10(num), or [code]NAN[/code] if the result would be too large.

method.name: max_of
method.description: Returns the greater of [param a] and [param b].

method.name: min_of
method.description: Returns the smaller of [param a] and [param b].

method.name: mul
method.description: Multiplies by [param other] and returns the new value.

method.name: negate
method.description: Returns the negative.

method.name: parse_float
method.description: Sets the value using [param value].

method.name: parse_mantissa_exponent
method.description: Sets the value using a [param mantissa] and a [param exponent].

method.name: parse_string
method.description: Sets the value using a string representing a number, supports scientific e notation.

method.name: pow_float
method.description: Returns num^[param power].

method.name: pow_int
method.description: Returns num^[param power].

method.name: root
method.description: Returns the [param n]th root.

method.name: set_default_max_digits
method.description: Sets the default amount of "real" digits to display before using scientific notation.

method.name: set_default_print_precision
method.description: Sets the default amount of fractional digits to display on scientific notation.

method.name: sqroot
method.description: Returns the square root.

method.name: sub
method.description: Subtracts [param other] and returns the new value.

method.name: to_int
method.description: Returns the value as a integer.

method.name: to_pretty_string
method.description: Returns the value as a string using [b]scientific e notation[/b] with a specified [param precision].
